title: epipactis secundiflora
intro: Epipactis secundiflora, also known as the brown beaked helleborine, is a type of terrestrial orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Epipactis secundiflora include its ability to help alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
